message:
Refresh sitemap.xml timestamps for SEO freshness signals

Update lastmod timestamps across all 11 sitemap entries to reflect
the current build date (2026-01-11T02:24:51.003Z).

Affected URLs:
- jeffreysprompts.com (homepage, priority 1.0)
- /bundles and /workflows (section indexes, priority 0.9)
- /prompts/idea-wizard, readme-reviser, robot-mode-maker (priority 0.8)
- /bundles/getting-started, jeffrey-essentials (priority 0.7)
- /contribute, /how_it_was_made, /install-cli.sh (priority 0.7)

Sitemap freshness is a minor but positive SEO signal. Search engines
use lastmod dates to prioritize crawl scheduling, and keeping these
timestamps current indicates active maintenance of the site content.

Note: This is an auto-generated file updated during build processes.
The content structure remains unchanged; only timestamps are refreshed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
